subject: [OOF] add Ingress to HAS API service
commit_message:
[OOF] add Ingress to HAS API service

Adding the Ingresses to HAS API service.

Issue-ID: OOM-2182
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
